title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: WeatherNext, Google DeepMind's weather forecasting AI model, successfully predicted Hurricane Melissa's intensity and track in October 2025, providing advance notice for evacuations in Jamaica. The system enabled meteorologists and authorities to issue life-saving warnings days before the Category 5 storm made landfall.
